mfc_cathode.notes: kinetic-stability override (C: kinetic inertness (CH4/HCO3- reaction rate ≈ 0 at MES temperatures)); thermodynamic Pourbaix says corroding toward HCO3[-1]

mec_cathode.notes: kinetic-stability override (C: kinetic inertness (CH4/HCO3- reaction rate ≈ 0 at MES temperatures)); thermodynamic Pourbaix says corroding toward CH4(aq)

materials.notes: MP Ti3C2 entry is theoretical, not experimentally confirmed; real Ti3C2Tx MXene has disordered surface terminations (-OH, -F, -O) that crystalline DFT cannot capture. MAX-phase parent Ti3AlC2 (mp-3747) is experimentally ground-state and could serve as an alternative anchor for bulk-chemistry reasoning; not used here to avoid conflating MAX and MXene.
